other_observers: a number of CFO Board Members led by Mark Peterson, who had found the bird that morning.
duration: 48minutes total; observed bird several different  times during the  entire time period.
description: The 1st winter Golden-crowned Sparrow was associating with a flock of White-crowned Sparrows.  We saw the bird several different times as we chased and relocated the mixed flock of sparrows.  The first thing I noticed was that the bird seemed to be a little heavier than the other sparrows, had a little different profile, and usually remained at the edge of the flock. When I saw it in the binoculars, the yellowish forecrown and faint eyeline were plainly visible.
